title: incorrect "Multiple top level modules" error on bind

features.name: bind interface to module instance
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that binds an interface directly to a module instance (not a module name)

features.name: interface with $sformatf instance_path
features.description: Code should include an interface with a string member using $sformatf to capture the instance path with %m format specifier

features.name: nested module hierarchy with bind target
features.description: Code should include a module hierarchy where an inner module instance (s_inst) is a bind target in an outer module (testharness_ext)
